Package com.github.javaparser.ast.body

Class ReceiverParameter

java.lang.Object
com.github.javaparser.ast.Node
com.github.javaparser.ast.body.ReceiverParameter
All Implemented Interfaces:
NodeWithAnnotations<ReceiverParameter>, NodeWithName<ReceiverParameter>, NodeWithRange<Node>, NodeWithTokenRange<Node>, NodeWithType<ReceiverParameter,​Type>, Observable, Visitable, HasParentNode<Node>, Cloneable
public class ReceiverParameter extends Node implements NodeWithType<ReceiverParameter,​Type>, NodeWithAnnotations<ReceiverParameter>, NodeWithName<ReceiverParameter>
The receiver parameter feature of Java.
All annotations preceding the type will be set on this object, not on the type. JavaParser doesn't know if it they are applicable to the receiver parameter or the type.
Author:
Julio Vilmar Gesser

      Description copied from interface: Visitable
      Accept method for visitor support.

      accept in interface Visitable
      Type Parameters:
      R - the type of the return value of the visitor
      A - the type the user argument passed to the visitor
      Parameters:
      v - the visitor implementation
      arg - the argument passed to the visitor (of type A)

      the result of the visit (of type R)

      public ReceiverParameter setAnnotations​(NodeList<AnnotationExpr> annotations)

      setAnnotations in interface NodeWithAnnotations<ReceiverParameter>
      Parameters:
      annotations - a null value is currently treated as an empty list. This behavior could change in the future, so please avoid passing null
